home.title: Femboy Potential Comprehensive Assessment Scale
home.intro: This is an in-depth assessment system combining a psychological scale with a behavioral logic test.
home.bankIntro: The system has loaded a dynamic question bank with 168 questions. This round will randomly draw 50 personalized test questions for you, divided into:
home.warning: ⚠️ Let your guard down and answer by first instinct. A personalized in-depth analysis report will be generated at the end.
home.disclaimer: This test is mainly for entertainment. Treat the results as rationally as you would choose milk tea sweetness.
home.start: Draw question bank and start assessment
quiz.tip: 🧭 Answer by first instinct. The system will check consistency patterns across your answers.

meta.ogDescription: An in-depth assessment system combining psychological scales with behavioral logic tests
home.introHtml: This is an in-depth assessment system combining a psychological scale with a behavioral logic test.
home.engineHtml: The system has loaded a dynamic question bank with 168 questions. This round will randomly draw 50 personalized test questions for you, divided into:
quiz.prompt: Please answer by first instinct. The system will compare answer patterns before and after.
quiz.helpers.likert: Judge how closely this statement matches your real state.
quiz.helpers.likertCheck: Used to check answer consistency patterns. Answer by first instinct as usual.
quiz.helpers.choice: Put yourself in the scenario and choose the response most like what you would do.
quiz.helpers.choiceCheck: This question does not directly count toward the total score, but it affects report reliability.
result.creatorNoteP1: I originally made this page on a random evening in early April because I was bored and wanted to give my group chat and nearby friends something silly to play with. Somehow, about a month later, it spread much farther than expected. The results from this test are very unscientific, some questions rely on stereotypes, and it should not be treated as a reference. It is just for fun.
result.creatorNoteP2: Some question designs and weights in the question bank lack broad social research and data analysis, and a fairly large share was generated with AI. Otherwise I could not have thrown this together in one night for my friends.
result.creatorNoteP3: I am not very sure when the site started spreading. I only noticed because a friend messaged me on QQ saying that the small site I had sent them a month earlier had appeared in another large group. When I checked the backend DNS resolution count, I realized it had taken off. At that time there was not even analytics added, because I had never expected this situation.
result.creatorNoteP4: For friends who answered seriously but still triggered the abnormal-answer punishment page, I am already trying to optimize the question bank and detection logic, and I am also considering whether to remove that page entirely. Some people like it as an easter egg, though, so it is hard to balance. Please bear with me. I truly did not mean any disrespect, and I am very sorry if it felt offensive. I was genuinely happy when I learned the site had become popular, and I am working on improving the related logic. Thank you for playing these days.
result.creatorNoteP5: If you have suggestions for improvement, you can message me on Bilibili or open a GitHub issue. I will do my best to handle what I can.
result.radarDefault: After the radar chart is generated, it will show your highest and lowest dimensions.
result.radarPunished: Abnormal answering forced the radar chart to zero. The system cannot provide valid highest or lowest dimensions.
result.radarUnavailable: The chart engine failed to load. Text results are still available.
result.qrHelp: Long-press to save or scan to take the test
result.actions.glitchRiskConfirm: This effect includes rapid flashing, shaking, and high-contrast color changes, which may trigger photosensitive discomfort or photosensitive epilepsy. Enable it anyway?

scoreStats.spamRank: Abnormal sample recorded; not included in the public average.
scoreStats.unavailable: Sample average is temporarily unavailable. Refresh later to view it.
scoreStats.average: Current valid sample average {average} / 250, with {count} samples collected. You are {compareText}.

over.text: This dimension is far above ordinary sample range.

high.text: This tendency is clear and stable.

medium.text: This dimension has visible traces, but it is not dominant.

none.text: This dimension is barely visible in this sample.

stability.defaultDesc: Your answer waveform is stable, and the report can be used as a valid entertainment sample.
stability.veryLowDesc: The answer pattern is highly abnormal, so the report has been intercepted.
stability.lowDesc: There are obvious inconsistencies in the answer pattern. Treat the result with caution.
stability.mediumDesc: The answer pattern is mostly usable, with some unstable signals.
stability.debugDesc: Debug bypass is enabled. This sample skips abnormal-answer interception.
stability.punishedFallback: This sample's waveform is too abstract, so the system served the abnormal-answer report first.

tiers.desc: Your current sample is highly defensive. Femboy potential is still in sleep mode.
A few soft signals appear, but the overall profile is still restrained.
The radar has started to light up. Some tendencies are already easy to notice.
Your preferences and behavior patterns show a clear soft tendency.
Multiple dimensions resonate. The hidden profile is becoming obvious.
Your result is already far beyond casual potential and has strong recognizability.
The system detects a rare high-intensity profile with very stable signals.
A top-tier entertainment sample. The system recommends saving this report for historical research.

punish.tier: You can fool your friends, but do not fool yourself.
punish.descs.1: You clicked too fast - average about {seconds} seconds per question.
punish.descs.2: You chose the same option {value} times. The answer waveform is too uniform.
punish.descs.3: You kept the same-answer streak for {value} questions. This looks more like button mashing than self-assessment.
punish.descs.4: You selected extreme answers {value} times. The sample has lost normal reference value.
punish.descs.5: Your stability score is only {value}. Valid analysis has been suspended.

punish.descs.1: The system detected an answer pattern that was too mechanical.
punish.descs.2: The consistency waveform has exceeded the normal range.
punish.descs.3: This sample looks more like button mashing than self-assessment.
punish.descs.4: The report has been switched to abnormal-answer mode.
punish.descs.5: Extreme answer behavior detected. Valid analysis has been suspended.

punish.analysis.1: The system detected that your total answering time was only {seconds} seconds. You barely looked at the questions, so it cannot produce an accurate profile. Femboy awakening needs honest self-reflection, not speed-running the buttons.
punish.analysis.2: The system detected a highly repetitive answer pattern. When too many answers are identical, the result no longer reflects real preference differences.
punish.analysis.3: The system detected a long same-answer streak. This sample is closer to mechanical clicking than a valid self-assessment.
punish.analysis.4: The system detected excessive extreme answers. The profile has been marked unstable because it lacks normal variation.
punish.analysis.5: The system detected severe consistency conflicts. The sample is no longer reliable enough for serious analysis.
punish.analysis.fallback: An abnormal answer pattern was detected, so the system refuses to continue serious analysis.

punish.analysis.1: Your answers were too uniform, so the system cannot read a reliable tendency.
punish.analysis.2: Several consistency checks contradicted each other too strongly.
punish.analysis.3: The answering rhythm was too fast, suggesting mechanical clicking.
punish.analysis.4: The sample lost statistical meaning before the report could be generated.
punish.analysis.5: The system identified a high-risk invalid sample and stopped serious analysis.
punish.analysis.fallback: An abnormal answer pattern was detected, so the system refuses to continue serious analysis.

punish.behavior: Your current behavior pattern looks impatient, mechanical, and highly perfunctory.
punish.advice: Clear your mind, drop the defenses, and retake the test by first instinct.

A.title: Aesthetic sensitivity profile
A.analysis: Your strongest signal comes from aesthetics and sensory preference. You notice texture, color, softness, and visual detail more easily than average.
A.behavior: In daily life, you may care about presentation, scent, fabric, small accessories, and the atmosphere created by objects around you.
A.advice: Try building a small personal aesthetic system. The system has already noticed your soft-detail radar.

B.title: Behavioral habit profile
B.analysis: Your strongest signal comes from body habits and self-management. You tend to keep your body language compact, restrained, and aware of space.
B.behavior: You may care about posture, cleanliness, grooming, and how your actions are perceived by people nearby.
B.advice: Keep the useful self-management habits, but do not turn every movement into a performance review.

C.title: Psychological empathy profile
C.analysis: Your strongest signal comes from emotional perception. You are sensitive to atmosphere, interpersonal distance, and subtle changes in tone.
C.behavior: You may often notice whether others are comfortable, whether a conversation is tense, or whether someone needs emotional support.
C.advice: Your empathy is useful, but remember that not every emotional fluctuation needs to become your responsibility.

D.title: Social subculture profile
D.analysis: Your strongest signal comes from social expression and subculture familiarity. You adapt easily to softer or more playful communication styles.
D.behavior: You may use expressive avatars, reaction images, nicknames, or softened wording to make interaction feel closer and less rigid.
D.advice: Your social style has recognizable flavor. Use it naturally instead of turning every chat into a stage performance.

straight.title: Straight-line defense profile
straight.analysis: Your current result is defensive and practical. Soft signals exist only in small traces or have not been activated in this sample.
straight.behavior: You may prefer directness, functionality, and low-maintenance choices, while avoiding overly delicate or playful styles.
straight.advice: No need to force a label. The funniest result is sometimes that the system found your firewall first.

legend.title: Legendary mixed-profile sample
legend.analysis: Multiple dimensions are strongly activated at the same time. The system sees a rare, high-density profile rather than a single tendency.
legend.behavior: You may combine aesthetic sensitivity, careful habits, emotional awareness, and playful social expression in a very recognizable way.
legend.advice: Please save this report. For entertainment purposes, this is already a museum-grade sample.

AB.title: Aesthetic + habit compound profile
AB.analysis: Your profile combines soft aesthetic preference with visible behavior and self-management habits.
AB.behavior: You may care not only about whether something looks good, but also about whether your daily actions match that sense of refinement.
AB.advice: The system recommends accepting that your details are not accidental. They have formed a stable pattern.

CD.title: Empathy + social expression compound profile
CD.analysis: Your profile combines emotional sensitivity with playful or softened social expression.
CD.behavior: You may be good at reading the room, adjusting tone, and using small social signals to reduce distance.
CD.advice: Keep the social flexibility, but remember to leave some emotional buffer for yourself.
